# Documentation IA Checklist: Maintainer and Contributor Release Workflow

**Purpose**: Validate that DOC-009 requirements define the `/contribute-and-release` page shape, navigation boundaries, generated-reference links, and DOC-010 handoff clearly before task generation.
**Created**: 2026-06-18
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` phase based on feature context and requirements.

## Route Ownership and Scope

- [x] CHK001 Does the spec require deepening the existing `/contribute-and-release` route instead of creating a new route? [Spec §FR-001, Plan §Structure Decision]
- [x] CHK002 Does the plan bound public content changes to `docs-site/src/content/docs/contribute-and-release.md` plus SpecKit artifacts? [Plan §Declared File Operations, Spec §Reviewability Notes]
- [x] CHK003 Does the spec preserve the DOC-002 shell ownership history while replacing the shell content with DOC-009 workflow depth? [Spec §Source Evidence Requirements]

## Page Shape

- [x] CHK004 Is the required page order explicit enough for task generation: purpose, source-of-truth map, change-type matrix, contributor path, maintainer readiness, version/release automation, final checklist, DOC-010 handoff? [Spec §Clarifications Session 1, Plan §Phase 2 Task Planning Approach]
- [x] CHK005 Does the spec require a how-to/reference hybrid rather than a pure inventory or pure tutorial? [Plan §Summary, Design Concept §Proposed Content Model]
- [x] CHK006 Does the matrix requirement name all five change types that the published page must classify? [Spec §FR-003, Spec §AC-9.1]

## Generated References

- [x] CHK007 Does the spec say generated reference pages remain generated and drift is corrected through the generator contract? [Spec §FR-013, Research §Decision 8]
- [x] CHK008 Are generated reference pages positioned as reader-facing links rather than primary behavior citations? [Spec §Clarifications Session 2, Research §Decision 2]
- [x] CHK009 Does the plan identify the generated-reference pages that should support deeper inventories? [Plan §Structure Decision, Quickstart §Implementation Steps]

## Handoff Quality

- [x] CHK010 Does DOC-009 explicitly hand future docs-site CI, search, accessibility, deep-link, responsive, and command-snippet validation hardening to DOC-010? [Spec §FR-014, Spec §Clarifications Session 3]
- [x] CHK011 Is the DOC-010 handoff visible without over-specifying future implementation mechanics? [Workflow §Phase 4 documentation-ia prompt, Plan §Phase 2 Task Planning Approach]

## Findings

- No gap markers found.
- No consensus escalation required.
